hidden_state.scenario_summary: Customer experienced unavailability during a planned maintenance window that is excluded from service credits.
latent_facts: The maintenance was announced ahead of time.
The service interruption was real but contractually excluded.
The incident should not be treated as a breach.
likely_failure_modes: The model sees outage language and incorrectly grants credit.
The model misses the maintenance exclusion in the policy.

case_packet.title: Planned maintenance causes temporary unavailability

notes: Maintenance notices are delivered by email and status page.

usage_record.telemetry_summary: Usage stopped during the planned maintenance window and resumed immediately after.

incident_record.customer_impact_summary: Training API unavailable during a planned maintenance window.
incident_record.engineering_summary: Planned control-plane maintenance temporarily paused new job submissions.

case_packet.customer_note: Our run queue was unavailable during the maintenance window and we want to know whether credits apply.
case_packet.policy_snippet: Scheduled maintenance windows announced in advance are excluded from SLA service credits.
case_packet.visible_case_summary: Real customer impact, but the contract excludes scheduled maintenance from credits.

adjudication_notes: The impact is real, but maintenance exclusion controls the commercial outcome.
ground_truth.reference_customer_note: The interruption occurred during a planned maintenance window that was excluded from SLA credits under your contract, so no service credit applies. We can still share the maintenance summary and timing.
ground_truth.reference_internal_note: Owner: engineering_owner. Action: send_explanation_only because this is scheduled_maintenance with contractual exclusion and no system discrepancy.
